svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(226, 232, 240), rgb(34, 39, 46));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1486px; height: 1px; padding-top: 36px; margin-left: 10px;

div.div:
Figure 3. A four-layer memory stack for state-centric serving
The useful distinction is not just short-term vs long-term, but parameter memory vs live state vs external memory vs tool-ground truth

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 104px; margin-left: 90px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #64748B;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 247, 237), rgb(30, 23, 15)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(180, 83, 9), rgb(223, 139, 76));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 172px; height: 1px; padding-top: 238px; margin-left: 1292px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Fast / scarce
high-value state
should stay here

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(180, 83, 9), rgb(223, 139, 76)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(180, 83, 9), rgb(223, 139, 76));
fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 253, 250), rgb(14, 25, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 172px; height: 1px; padding-top: 714px; margin-left: 1292px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Slow / rich
store explicit
artifacts and fetch
on demand

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 882px; height: 1px; padding-top: 233px; margin-left: 192px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Layer 1. Weights / parameter memory
general capabilities, broad priors, model identity
slow to update, globally shared, expensive to personalize

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(29, 78, 216), rgb(129, 171, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(29, 78, 216), rgb(129, 171, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 882px; height: 1px; padding-top: 386px; margin-left: 192px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Layer 2. Live state / active horizon
task plan, current hypotheses, local variables, recent tool outcomes
bounded by quality-cost trade-offs, not by the ambition to remember everything

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(180, 83, 9), rgb(223, 139, 76)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(180, 83, 9), rgb(223, 139, 76));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 882px; height: 1px; padding-top: 564px; margin-left: 192px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Layer 3. External memory artifacts
notes, AGENTS.md, memories, plans, retrieval indexes, structured summaries
versionable, inspectable, shareable, and cheaper to persist than raw token history

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 882px; height: 1px; padding-top: 731px; margin-left: 192px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Layer 4. Tools and environment
repo state, databases, browsers, APIs, observability, real-world systems
final truth source when the model must verify instead of merely remember

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 241, 242), rgb(37, 25, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(190, 18, 60), rgb(255, 154, 190));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 86px; height: 1px; padding-top: 474px; margin-left: 39px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Token-preserving
mindset
keep as much
history as
possible

fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 253, 250), rgb(14, 25, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 94px; height: 1px; padding-top: 474px; margin-left: 1151px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #0F172A;

div.div:
State-preserving
mindset
retain only
what must
stay live

div.div: This hierarchy combines systems practice (compaction, memories, AGENTS) with research on memory-operating systems.

div.div: The active horizon H* is the operating range that stays live before external recall becomes cheaper than internal retention.
